{{Infobox character
| name = Death Monarch Yerin Arelius
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
| name = Death Monarch Yerin Arelius
| aliases = Yerin Arelius
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Death Monarch, Uncrowned Queen, Overlady
| abilities = Blood Shadow
| affiliations = House Arelius clan, Blackflame Empire, cult of the Bleeding Phoenix
| introduced = Threshold: Stories from Cradle
}}

''See also: [[Death Monarch Yerin Arelius Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yerin]] Arelius is a highly skilled [[sacred artist]] and the apprentice of both [[Eithan]] Arelius and the [[Sword Sage]]. Though she was adopted into the [[Arelius family]] as an outer member, she eventually rose to significant prominence. A prodigy in combat, she demonstrated mastery over the [[sword aura]] and her white-bladed weapon, [[Goldsign]], achieving [[Highgold]] advancement at a young age. Her combat prowess is further highlighted by her ability to utilize the [[Blood Shadow]] technique and her achievement of a reflection of the [[Sword Icon]]. Throughout her journey, [[Yerin]] has faced immense challenges, including battles against soldiers, [[Dreadgods]], and [[Monarchs]]. Her path eventually led her to ascend to the rank of [[Monarch]], specifically becoming known as the [[Death]] [[Monarch]]. In this role, she wields the power of the [[Death Icon]], a force characterized by a colorless absence of sound and power. Recognized as a formidable figure such as the [[Void Sage]] or [[Overlady]], she has been described as a person destined to kill monsters rather than merely fight them.}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Yerin]] Arelius is a disciple of the [[Sword Sage]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] Arelius carries a pale [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3">''Skysworn'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] Arelius's [[Goldsign]] is a pair of silver arms that flatten into [[sword]]-blades.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Yerin]] Arelius wears a red rope of living [[madra]] around her waist that is rank with blood [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3" />}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|An adopted member of the [[House Arelius]] clan, [[Yerin]] Arelius utilized a transmission construct to communicate during the events of the tournament. She secured the eleventh rank in the competition after successfully taking a crown. Ultimately, she is identified as a chosen of [[Akura Malice]] from the [[Blackflame Empire]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] Arelius spoke through the transmission construct.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c6">''Uncrowned'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] Arelius is an adopted member of the [[House Arelius]] clan.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12">''Uncrowned'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] Arelius is ranked eleventh in the tournament.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] Arelius took a crown during the competition.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin]] Arelius is of the [[Blackflame Empire]] and a chosen of [[Akura Malice]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c18">''Uncrowned'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Red Faith]] wants to tutor [[Yerin]] Arelius.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] Arelius has cultivated her [[Blood Shadow]] with a technique created by the [[Blood Sage]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] Arelius is the victor of the [[Uncrowned King]] tournament.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c27">''Wintersteel'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Uncrowned Queen]], [[Yerin]] Arelius, was once expected to be the one to drive off the [[Dreadgod]]. A person of interest to the [[Red Faith]], she possesses red eyes and can be tracked through the use of spiritual perception. During this time, she harbored a deep hatred for both the [[Phoenix]] and her [[Blood Shadow]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] Arelius was expected to drive off the [[Dreadgod]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] Arelius is the [[Uncrowned Queen]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] Arelius is a person of interest to [[Red Faith]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7">''Reaper'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] Arelius hated her [[Blood Shadow]] and the [[Phoenix]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] Arelius can be tracked with spiritual perception.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] Arelius is a character with red eyes.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c21">''Reaper'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] is an [[Overlady]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c7">''Dreadgod'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen]] wants [[Lindon]] and [[Yerin]] Arelius gone.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c4">''Waybound'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Yerin]] Arelius protects the cult of the [[Bleeding Phoenix]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Death Monarch Yerin Arelius]] lost her home to the [[Phoenix]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c13">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|“Yerin Arelius,” Jai Long said evenly. “Disciple of the Sword Sage.”<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|"My sister took one, and Yerin Arelius the other,"<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|“She is not hard to locate with spiritual perception, so we found her weeks ago, but I instructed my Emissaries not to approach.”<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c7" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“The cult of the Bleeding Phoenix is protected by Yerin Arelius, and I carry her burdens now.”<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c3" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
